title: Yambag Release Fast, Nasty New Eight-Song, Eight-Minute EP The Psycho
author: Tom Breihan

The post Yambag Release Fast, Nasty New Eight-Song, Eight-Minute EP <em>The Psycho</em> appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
They're called Yambag. That really tells you everything to know. If you need more than that, you should've already gotten it from the headline. A band called Yambag has a new EP, and it's eight songs in eight minutes. You probably already have a pretty good idea whether this appeals to you or not. If you're cool, it probably does.

Yambag come from Cleveland, and their last record, 2024's Mindfuck Ultra, had 10 songs in 11 minutes. Naturally, their next move is to go even faster and uglier. That's what we get with The Psycho. It's short and fast like powerviolence, but it's simpler and more direct than that. I have listened to it once, and i am out of breath. Give it a shot below.

The Psycho is out now on Convulse.
